mapper.insert: /*获得刚刚插入的时候所生成的主键值 把id的值赋给类Dish里面的id*/ insert into dish (name, category_id, price, image, description, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values (#{name}, #{categoryId}, #{price}, #{image}, #{description}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser})
